acceptance_criteria.description: Users must be unable to access any page without first logging in with valid credentials.
kane_steps: Navigate directly to https://www.saucedemo.com/inventory.html without logging in
Observe that the application redirects the user back to the login page
Confirm that the inventory page content is not visible
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Protected pages redirect unauthenticated users to login

acceptance_criteria.description: After successfully logging in with valid credentials, the user is redirected to the product inventory page.
kane_steps: Navigate to https://www.saucedemo.com/
Enter username 'standard_user' and password 'secret_sauce'
Click the Login button
Verify the user lands on the inventory page (URL contains /inventory.html)
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Successful login redirects to inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: The inventory page displays product tiles, each containing the product name, image, and price.
kane_steps: Log in with valid credentials and navigate to the inventory page
Inspect each product tile and confirm a product name is visible
Confirm a product image is displayed on each tile
Confirm a price is displayed on each tile
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Inventory tiles show name, image, and price

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product name on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the name of any product
Verify the product detail page opens and displays the correct product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product name opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: Clicking a product image on the inventory page opens the product detail page for that product.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the image of any product
Verify the product detail page opens and displays the correct product
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Clicking product image opens detail page

acceptance_criteria.description: The product detail page displays the product name, description, price, and an Add to Cart button.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click on any product to open its detail page
Verify the product name, description, and price are all visible
Verify an 'Add to cart' button is present on the page
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Product detail page shows full product info

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can add a product to the cart from the inventory page by clicking the Add to Cart button on a product tile.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Locate a product tile and click its 'Add to cart' button
Verify the product is added to the cart (e.g., cart badge updates)
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Add to cart button works from inventory page

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking Add to Cart on the inventory page, the button label for that product changes to 'Remove'.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the 'Add to cart' button on any product tile
Verify the button label for that product now reads 'Remove'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Button changes to Remove after adding item

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart badge in the top navigation updates to reflect the current number of items in the cart.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Note that the cart badge shows no count (or zero)
Click 'Add to cart' on one product and verify the badge shows '1'
Click 'Add to cart' on a second product and verify the badge shows '2'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart badge count updates on item add

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can remove a product from the cart by clicking the Remove button on the inventory page.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the 'Remove' button on that product tile
Verify the item is removed from the cart (cart badge count decreases)
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Remove button removes item from cart

acceptance_criteria.description: After clicking the Remove button on the inventory page, the button label for that product changes back to 'Add to cart'.
kane_steps: Log in, navigate to the inventory page, and add a product to the cart
Click the 'Remove' button on that product tile
Verify the button label reverts to 'Add to cart'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Button reverts to Add to Cart after removal

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can navigate to the cart page at /cart.html.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the cart icon in the top navigation
Verify the URL changes to include /cart.html
Verify the cart page content is displayed
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart page is accessible via navigation

acceptance_criteria.description: The cart page lists all items that have been added, displaying each item's name, quantity, and price.
kane_steps: Log in, add two or more products from the inventory page
Navigate to the cart page at /cart.html
Verify each added item appears in the list
Confirm each item shows its name, quantity, and price
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Cart page lists items with name, quantity, price

acceptance_criteria.description: Users can sort products on the inventory page using a sort dropdown located in the top right.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Locate the sort dropdown in the top-right area of the page
Click the dropdown and verify sort options are displayed
Select an option and verify the product list reorders accordingly
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown is present and functional

acceptance_criteria.description: The sort dropdown contains exactly four options: Name (A to Z), Name (Z to A), Price (low to high), and Price (high to low).
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Click the sort dropdown
Verify the four options — 'Name (A to Z)', 'Name (Z to A)', 'Price (low to high)', 'Price (high to low)' — are all present
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Sort dropdown contains all four expected options

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Price (low to high)' sorts the product list so the cheapest product (Sauce Labs Onesie at $7.99) appears first.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Price (low to high)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product displayed is 'Sauce Labs Onesie'
Verify the price shown is $7.99
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Price low-to-high sort shows cheapest item first

acceptance_criteria.description: Selecting 'Name (A to Z)' sorts the product list alphabetically so that 'Sauce Labs Backpack' appears first.
kane_steps: Log in and navigate to the inventory page
Select 'Name (A to Z)' from the sort dropdown
Verify the first product displayed is 'Sauce Labs Backpack'
acceptance_criteria.kane_one_liner: Name A-to-Z sort shows Backpack first
